caption: A woman with curly blonde hair tied up and wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt is positioned in a recording studio. She is speaking into a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm, with her hand resting near her chin. Behind her is a light-colored wall with a yellow vertical stripe and a black screen displaying the name "Johnson" in red text and "Employee Only" in small white text. A logo for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is visible on the screen and as an overlay on the right side of the frame. Across the sequence, the woman maintains a consistent posture and focused expression while talking, with only slight movements of her head and facial expressions as she speaks. The camera remains static, capturing her from the chest up in a medium close-up shot.
